summary: Completed comprehensive testing of modernized García Sellerie Garniture website. All requested features working perfectly including mint green badges, dark theme, service cards with corner icons, gallery filters, navigation scrolling, and contact form integration.
passed_tests: Page loads correctly with all sections
Navigation works with smooth scrolling to all sections (accueil, services, galerie, contact)
All 4 service cards render correctly (Automobile, Moto, Nautisme, Mobilier)
Service cards display icons in top-right corners as requested
Gallery filter buttons work perfectly (Tous, Automobile, Moto, Nautisme, Mobilier)
Gallery filtering shows correct number of items per category
Contact form submission integrates with backend and shows success message
17 badge components found with mint green background (#c5d4c0)
Dark theme implemented correctly with background color rgb(10, 15, 12) matching #0a0f0c
15 elements found with dark background classes
All form elements present and functional (name, email, phone, project type, message)
